title: Bushy Leaf Litter
description: A resource pack which gives the leaf litter block a new bushier model
body:
![Tinted leaf litter in a forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/573cc40317245f2f52f86bfc3ea26cb0713f0525.jpeg)

Gives the brand new leaf litter a bushy and piled up look thanks to a slight model and texture change.
